Hardware Component File

CD3_SCCM_V1_1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference CD3_SCCM_V1_1_190827_20190828T141623.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DAA2F2
Receive ID 18DAF2A2
Functional Addr A2
Functional Name SCCM

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "B517",
    "soft": "",
    "version": "SCCM_0220"
